name: Telecom Fraud Shield
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure Event Hubs
services.purpose: Real-time CDR and signaling ingestion — call detail records, SIM swap events, SMSC routing logs, SS7/Diameter signaling, billing trigger events, roaming activity streams, number portability notifications

services.name: Azure Stream Analytics
services.purpose: Real-time fraud pattern detection — SIM swap velocity checks, Wangiri callback pattern matching, toll fraud burst detection, revenue share fraud IRSF routing analysis, simultaneous call anomaly detection, geo-velocity impossible travel

prod.note: 6 streaming units, complex temporal pattern matching

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for fraud intelligence — novel fraud pattern explanation, false positive disambiguation, fraud ring narrative generation, regulatory report drafting, operator alert enrichment with human-readable context

prod.note: ~1.5M tokens/day, gpt-4o for complex fraud analysis

enterprise.note: Provisioned throughput, real-time fraud narrative generation

services.name: Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Fraud case store — subscriber risk profiles, SIM swap history, call pattern baselines, fraud verdicts, blocked number registry, IRSF destination watchlists, investigation audit trail

prod.note: Dedicated throughput, change feed for real-time blocking

enterprise.note: Multi-region writes, analytical store for fraud trend mining

services.name: Azure Functions
services.purpose: Fraud action orchestration — SIM swap block execution, Wangiri callback suppression, toll fraud circuit termination, regulatory reporting triggers, carrier interconnect notification, subscriber alerting

prod.note: Pre-warmed, VNET integrated, sub-second cold start

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: Carrier interconnect credentials, SS7/Diameter gateway keys, SMSC API secrets, fraud database encryption keys, regulatory reporting signing certificates

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Fraud detection KPIs — detection latency (target <500ms), false positive rate, blocked fraud value, SIM swap interception rate, Wangiri suppression rate, system throughput metrics

optimization_tips: Use GPT-4o-mini for routine fraud alert summaries and standard blocking notifications — reserve GPT-4o for complex fraud ring analysis and novel pattern investigation, saving 70% on AI costs

Implement tiered Stream Analytics complexity — simple threshold rules (SIM swap velocity, call burst limits) run on fewer SUs while complex temporal pattern matching (IRSF routing graphs, Wangiri callback chains) uses dedicated SU pools
Use Cosmos DB change feed with Functions instead of polling — fraud verdicts trigger blocking actions in real-time without expensive continuous queries against the fraud case store
Archive resolved fraud cases older than 90 days to cool storage — active fraud detection only needs recent subscriber baselines and current watchlists, not historical investigation archives
Right-size Event Hubs throughput units based on actual CDR volume — most operators see 3-5x traffic variation between peak and off-peak; auto-inflate handles spikes without over-provisioning
Set Azure Cost Management budgets with alerts at 50%, 80%, 100%
